title: Schedule a Cron Job
description: Add a cron entry that writes a heartbeat file every minute. Work in the lab server directly from the integrated terminal.
tasks: Install cron if needed and ensure the service is running
Add a user crontab line that touches /tmp/cron-heartbeat every minute
Wait up to two minutes or run the job manually, then confirm the heartbeat file exists

objectivesPublic.label: Add the cron schedule
objectivesPublic.text: Schedule a recurring job that updates the heartbeat file under /tmp.
objectivesPublic.hint: User crontabs use five time fields plus a command — every minute is the finest common interval.

objectivesPublic.label: Heartbeat file present
objectivesPublic.text: Confirm the heartbeat file exists after the job has had time to run.
objectivesPublic.hint: List the file under /tmp or wait a minute after saving crontab — ensure the cron service is running.
